revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[</nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]<nowiki>]]) -->
== Usage == {{tl|Namespaces}} is used as a sidebar, mostly on Wikipedia pages about the different namespaces.
== See also == * {{Tlx|Namespace Greek}} assigns a Greek letter to each namespace, to assist sorting. * {{tlx|namespace name}} parses these from numbers. <includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Wikipedia namespace templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia help templates]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[</nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]<nowiki>]]) -->
== Usage == {{tl|Namespaces}} is used as a sidebar, mostly on Wikipedia pages about the different namespaces.
== See also == * {{Tlx|Namespace Greek}} assigns a Greek letter to each namespace, to assist sorting. * {{tlx|namespace name}} parses these from numbers. <includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Wikipedia namespace templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia help templates]] }}</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[</nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]<nowiki>]]) -->
== Usage == {{tl|Namespaces}} is used as a sidebar, mostly on Wikipedia pages about the different namespaces.
== See also == * {{Tlx|Namespace Greek}} assigns a Greek letter to each namespace, to assist sorting. * {{tlx|namespace name}} parses these from numbers. <includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Wikipedia namespace templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia help templates]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[</nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]<nowiki>]]) -->
== Usage == {{tl|Namespaces}} is used as a sidebar, mostly on Wikipedia pages about the different namespaces.
== See also == * {{Tlx|Namespace Greek}} assigns a Greek letter to each namespace, to assist sorting. * {{tlx|namespace name}} parses these from numbers. <includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Wikipedia namespace templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia help templates]] }}</includeonly> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23515730952|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[</nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]<nowiki>]]) -->
== Usage == {{tl|Namespaces}} is used as a sidebar, mostly on Wikipedia pages about the different namespaces.
== See also == * {{Tlx|Namespace Greek}} assigns a Greek letter to each namespace, to assist sorting. * {{tlx|namespace name}} parses these from numbers. <includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Wikipedia namespace templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia help templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24951476559|time triggered pipeline]]
